title: National Milling Corporation (Scheduled Firms) (Modification of Companies Ordinance) Order, 1968
title_en: National Milling Corporation (Scheduled Firms) (Modification of Companies Ordinance) Order, 1968

provisions.content: This Order may be cited as the National Milling Corporation (Scheduled Firms) (Modification of Companies Ordinance) Order.

In this Order, unless the context otherwise requires— " the Ordinance " means the Companies Ordinance 1 ; 1 R.L. Cap. 212 " Scheduled firms " means the companies specified in the Second Schedule to the National Milling Corporation (Transfer of Vested Interests) Order 2 . 2 G.N. No. 90 of 1968
The provisions of the Ordinance set out in the Schedule to this Order shall not apply to the scheduled firms.

The terms "extraordinary resolution" and "special resolution" appearing in the Ordinance in relation to the resolutions of a Company shall, insofar as the Ordinance applies to the scheduled firms, mean an ordinary resolution of the National Milling Corporation passed in accordance with the rules for the time being regulating the proceedings of the Corporation.

The Ordinance as modified by paragraph 5 of the Scheduled Firms (Modification of Companies Ordinance) Regulations 3 made under the State Trading Corporation (Establishment and Vesting of Interests) Act 4 , shall apply to the scheduled firms subject to the following further modifications 5 — 3 G.N. No. 175 of 1967 4 Act No. 2 of 1967 5 G.N. No. 347 of 1968 (a) in subsection (1) of section 2 of the Ordinance delete the definition "Scheduled company" and substitute therefor the following new definition— " 'Scheduled Company' means a company specified in Part II of the Schedule to the State Trading Corporation (Establishment and Vesting of Interests) Act 6 , or a company specified in the Second Schedule to the National Milling Corporation (Transfer Vested Interests) Order 7 ; and 6 Act No. 2 of 1967 7 G.N. No. 90 of 1968 (b) in section 285A of the Ordinance — (i) in subsection (2) add immediately after the word "come" in the third line the words ", or to have come, or shall be deemed to have come,"; (ii) in subsection (3) delete the words "the State Trading Corporation established by the State Trading Corporation (Establishment and Vesting of Interests) Act 8 (hereinafter referred to as the Corporation)" which occur in paragraph (a) and substitute therefor the words "the Corporation". 8 Act No. 2 of 1967 (4) In this section— (a) "Minister" means, in relation to the companies specified in Part II of the Schedule to the State Trading Corporation (Establishment and Vesting of Interests) Act, 1967 the Minister for the time being responsible for Commerce, and in relation to the companies specified in the Second Schedule to the National Milling Corporation (Transfer of Vested Interests) Order 9 , the Minister for the time being responsible for Agriculture; 9 G.N. No. 90 of 1968 (b) "the Corporation" means— (i) where an order under this section is made in relation to a company specified in Part II of the Schedule to the State Trading Corporation Establishment and Vesting of Interests) Act, 1967, the State Trading Corporation established by that Act; (ii) where such order is made in relation to a company specified in the Second Schedule to the National Milling Corporation (Transfer of Vested Interests) Order, 1968, the National Milling Corporation established by the National Milling Corporation Act 10 . 10 Cap. 160 Schedule Sections 29, 96, 97, 98, 99, 100, 102, 103, 104, 105, 106, 107, 108, 109, 110, 111, 117, 145.
